name: Witch Doctor
description: Malpractice makes perfect. Zharvakko, the Witch Doctor A wiry silhouette hitches forward—uneven of feature and limb, bizarre of gait, relentlessly criss-crossing the battlefield in search of that vital weak point where his talents can do most good, and most harm.

abilities.name: Gris-Gris
abilities.description: Starts the game with a neutral consumable item — Gris-Gris. This can be consumed anytime to grant the stored gold to the Doctor. The stored gold passively increases per in-game interval. Stored Gold to Bonus Gold Factor: 1. Gold Increase Interval: 3. Death Gold Loss to Gold Increase Factor: 1.

abilities.name: Paralyzing Cask
abilities.description: Launches a cask that ricochets between enemy units, stunning and damaging those it hits. Cast Range: 600. Bounce Distance: 575. Number of Bounces: 4/5/6/7 (7/8/9/10). First Damage: 55/70/85/100. Damage Increment per Bounce: 20. Stun Duration: 0.8. Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 80/100/120/140.

abilities.name: Voodoo Restoration
abilities.description: Focuses his magic to heal nearby allied units, costing mana every second to keep the aura active. Radius: 500/550/600/650. Heal per Second: 20/30/40/50. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Max Health as Heal per Second: (1%). Cooldown: 9/12/15/18.

abilities.name: Maledict
abilities.description: The curse also deals bursts of damage per interval based on the amount of current health lost since the curse begin. Cast Range: 600. Radius: 200 (204). Damage per Second: 15/20/25/30. Duration: 12 (18). Proc Interval: 4. Current Health Loss to Damage: 16%/24%/32%/40%. Cooldown: 30/26/22/18. Mana Cost: 105/110/115/120.

abilities.name: Voodoo Switcheroo
abilities.description: The Doctor turns into the Death Ward of its corresponding level while being hidden. Duration: 2.5. Attack Speed Slow: 45. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Death Ward
abilities.description: Summons a deadly ward to attack enemy heroes within its attack range. The Death Ward's attacks now bounce between nearby enemy units. Deals pure attack damage on the first attacked unit, with subsequent bounces dealing pure spell damage instead. Cast Range: 500. Max Channel Time: 8. Max Attack Targets: 1. Pure Attack Damage: 60/90/120 (100/130/160). Bounce Distance: (575) Number of Bounces:. Bounce Distance: (575). Cooldown: 100/90/80. Mana Cost: 200.
